improvements.areaName: SEO Meta Description and OG Tags
improvements.suggestion: <meta name="description" content="Gideon is your AI-powered trade and business assistant. Get instant answers, voice chat, and professional support for operations and trade. Try three free searches today."><meta property="og:title" content="Gideon – AI Trade & Business Assistant | GDN AI"><meta property="og:description" content="Your Claude-powered assistant for trade and business. Instant AI answers, voice chat, and an unlimited members workspace. Start with three free searches."><meta property="og:type" content="website"><meta property="og:image" content="https://gdn.ai/og-image.jpg"><meta property="og:url" content="https://gdn.ai/"><meta name="twitter:card" content="summary_large_image">
improvements.rationale: A compelling meta description improves click-through rates from search results by clearly communicating the core value proposition and free trial offer. Open Graph tags ensure professional, branded previews when the homepage is shared on LinkedIn, Twitter, and Facebook—critical channels for reaching business owners and professionals. Including the three free searches offer creates a low-friction call to action directly in search and social previews.

improvements.suggestion:
Hero Headline: "Meet Gideon — Your AI Trade & Business Assistant"

Subheading: "Get instant answers, voice chat support, and a dedicated workspace to streamline your operations. Try three searches free — no card required."
improvements.rationale: The headline immediately introduces the product name and core function, building brand recognition. The subheading highlights three key value props (instant answers, voice chat, workspace) while the free trial offer with 'no card required' reduces friction and encourages action. Copy is concise, benefit-driven, and avoids unverifiable claims.

improvements.suggestion:
Q: What happens after my three free searches?

A: Once you've used your three complimentary searches, you'll be invited to join as a member. Membership starts from just US$2 per day (billed monthly), giving you unlimited access to Gideon's AI-powered trade and business support, voice chat, and your personal members workspace. Choose annual billing to save 30 percent.
improvements.rationale: This FAQ directly addresses the most common conversion-barrier question—what happens at the paywall. It transparently explains the free-to-paid transition, reinforces value (unlimited access, voice chat, workspace), and highlights the annual savings incentive, reducing friction and building trust at the decision point.
